text: Students reported cars turning across the bike approach during morning arrival.
A 180-foot segment between the bus stop and school entrance lacks a continuous walking path.
The nearest frequent-route stop is outside the comfortable five-minute walk shed.
Compost bins appear behind the cafeteria exit rather than in the main lunch disposal path.
Cars queue for multiple signal cycles near the pickup lane between 3:00 and 3:25 PM.
Refill stations exist, but signage is not visible from the gym and courtyard entries.
